pageContext.name: 9th Army of the White Iron Cavalry
pageContext.description: Sideshow and JoyToy are excited to present the 9th Army of the White Iron Cavalry Collectible Figure!  This 1:18 Scale Battle for the Stars figure has multiple points of articulation and stands at 5.31' tall. It also comes with extra hand parts and a sword.   Don't miss your chance to add this figure to your Battle for the Stars collection today!
